stopConditions.description: halt when iteration or cost budget reaches the deterministic demo cap
block release-candidate promotion while a mandatory human approval gate remains pending
halt when the trailing no-progress window shows no completed demo stage movement

generatedStatePolicy: Generated producer demo runs, assets, content, coverage, release-candidate artifacts, and local state remain untracked unless explicitly fixture-scoped.
boundary: Reuses evolve-campaign/fuzz budget and stop-condition shape; no new control engine; game-scale budgets are hard Rust/local evidence gates; human approval gates mandatory; proposal-only producer progress; browser/Studio read-only; no direct trusted writes; no auto-apply; no auto-merge; no self-approval; no reviewer bypass; no production-ready claim; no engine replacement claim.
